fields.acceptance_criteria: 1. A canonical spec defines upstream blockers trees, downstream unblocked-by trees, recently-unblocked ordering semantics, and indexed workflow-fact expectations. 2. The planning output distinguishes became_actionable_at from last_blocker_progress_at and places each signal in the correct command and ordering surface. 3. The implementation tracker and child tickets cover shared workflow trees, indexed propagation, CLI rendering, and transport parity without overlapping scopes. 4. The resulting dependency graph lets implementation proceed in natural order after the planning ticket is done.

fields.implementation_summary: Created the blocker-tree and recently-unblocked workflow blueprint spec, defined exact semantics for became_actionable_at versus last_blocker_progress_at, and created a tracker plus child implementation tickets covering shared tree derivation, indexed workflow facts, CLI tree rendering, and ranking integration.

fields.validation_summary: Validation on 2026-05-22: ticket search confirmed there was no existing blocker-tree or recently-unblocked planning ticket in either ticket store. spec refs d702ed9e-f75c-4727-8f05-1b2b244ec74f validate passed, and ticket health passed for both the planning ticket and the implementation tracker after wiring the dependency graph.
